page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.6xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The instance is configured with 48.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it provides an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks indicate average multi-core capabilities alongside weaker single-core execution. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test scores 21007.3, which is in the average tier, while the single-core CPU performance of 1313.3 falls into the lower tier. Memory bandwidth is solid, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 1168.35 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 47.99 GB/sec. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performs at an average level of 101.61 GB/sec, whereas single-threaded gzip compression is weaker at 22.86 GB/sec.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for compute-bound tasks that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. It is well-suited for multi-threaded workloads such as static web serving, database operations, and parallelized data processing, as demonstrated by its average Redis SET throughput of 20.09 million operations per second and static web serving throughput of 15.86 GB/sec.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.6xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY x86_64 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 48.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Benchmark data shows average multi-core CPU performance with a stress-ng score of 21007.3 and a PassMark CPU score of 21643.62, though single-core performance is weaker. With an average Redis SET throughput of 20.09 million operations per second and static web serving throughput of 15.86 GB/sec, this instance is suited for multi-threaded compute workloads, web serving, and database operations that do not require local disk storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.6xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 48 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for multi-threaded workloads and web serving.

tagline: A dedicated 24-core compute-optimized instance with a balanced memory-to-core ratio for multi-threaded processing and web serving workloads.

48.0 GB of system memory with a 2.0 GB per core ratio
